description_long: This object consists of three mushrooms with broad, convex caps in shades of reddish-orange, each displaying subtle speckling and color variation. The largest mushroom stands centrally, with a thick, dark brown stem and a smooth, slightly matte cap. Two smaller mushrooms cluster at its base, one with a similarly colored cap and the other with more pronounced pale spots. The stems are robust and cylindrical, with a slightly lighter band near the base of the largest mushroom. The caps have a gentle, straight margin and a soft, velvety appearance. No gills are visible beneath the caps, and the mushrooms appear fresh and plump, suitable for a park or garden setting.
description: A cluster of three reddish-orange mushrooms with smooth, speckled caps and thick, dark stems. The caps are convex and velvety, with subtle color gradients and pale spots.
description_view_0: Two large mushrooms and one smaller mushroom are visible, with the largest cap dominating the view and the smaller mushrooms clustered to the right.
description_view_1: The central, largest mushroom cap is fully visible, flanked by two smaller mushrooms at its base, showing more of their caps and stems.
description_view_2: The largest mushroom cap is seen from a side angle, with the smaller mushroom in the foreground displaying its spotted cap.
description_view_3: The back of the largest mushroom cap is visible, showing its smooth, unblemished surface and hiding most of the smaller mushrooms.
attribute_cap_pattern: smooth with subtle speckling and pale spots
